ec2.transitgatewaymulticastgroupmember.C: Registers members (network interfaces) with the transit gateway multicast group. A member is a network interface associated with a supported EC2 instance that receives multicast traffic. For information about supported instances, see [Multicast Consideration](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/vpc/latest/tgw/transit-gateway-limits.html

ec2.transitgatewaymulticastgroupmember.G.Description: The IP address assigned to the transit gateway multicast group.

ec2.transitgatewaymulticastgroupmember.N.Description: The group members' network interface IDs to register with the transit gateway multicast group.

ec2.transitgatewaymulticastgroupmember.T.Description: The ID of the transit gateway multicast domain.
